name: EZPAWN
description_short: EZPAWN in Las Vegas offers collateral-based pawn loans, gold buying, firearms lending, and pre-owned retail merchandise at 25–70% off retail prices.
description_long:
EZPAWN is a national pawn shop chain with a Las Vegas location at 1501 East Charleston Boulevard. The store operates six days a week with extended hours (9am–7pm Monday through Saturday) and reduced Sunday hours (12pm–5pm), positioning itself as an accessible neighborhood financial services provider in central Las Vegas. The company markets itself on speed and simplicity, with the tagline emphasizing quick cash with 'service and respect.'

The store offers a wide range of financial and retail services built around collateral. Core offerings include pawn loans on any item in decent working condition, gold and diamond jewelry buying (with on-site precious metal testing), and firearms loans and purchases covering rifles, shotguns, and handguns. This Las Vegas location also carries auto loans, listed as a special category. On the retail side, EZPAWN sells pre-owned brand-name merchandise—electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming equipment, musical gear, handbags, and sneakers—at discounts of 25–70% off new retail prices, with fresh inventory arriving daily.

Several features differentiate EZPAWN from a standard pawn shop. The EZ+ Rewards Program lets customers earn points on pawn, redemption, buy, and sell transactions, and enables online management of pawns, layaways, and payments. An Instant Quote tool allows customers to get an estimated value for electronics online before visiting the store. Layaway is available year-round with only 10% down and monthly payments, while a 'Take Today' option partners with third-party financing companies for in-store purchases payable over up to 12 months. Optional Product Protection Plans and a Jewelry VIP Program (with guaranteed loan amounts and free cleaning) round out the value-add offerings.

EZPAWN is a practical option for Las Vegas residents who need fast cash against an asset or want to purchase used electronics and jewelry at steep discounts. The main caveat is that pawn loan fee structures and interest rates are not disclosed on the website—customers must visit in person for terms. Rates on pawn loans can be significantly higher than traditional consumer credit on an APR basis, and firearm redemptions require a background check. The rewards and online payment tools add genuine convenience for repeat customers, but this remains a high-cost, short-term borrowing option best used when traditional credit is unavailable.
pros: EZ+ Rewards Program earns points on every pawn, buy, and sell transaction with online account management
Instant Quote tool lets customers estimate electronics value online before visiting the store
Accepts firearms (rifles, shotguns, handguns) as loan collateral at select stores, including this location
On-site precious metal testing ensures fair, accurate gold and diamond pricing
Layaway available year-round with just 10% down and affordable monthly payments
Extended retail hours Mon–Sat 9am–7pm; open Sundays 12pm–5pm
Auto loans available as a special service category at this Las Vegas location
cons: Pawn loan interest rates and fee schedules are not disclosed on the website; must visit in-store for terms
Online payments not available in Arizona, Oregon, or Pennsylvania (relevant for multi-state customers)
Firearm redemption requires a background check unless exempted by law, adding a step to reclaim collateral
Appraisal amounts for firearms are at sole discretion of each location with no published rate guidance
Not all services (e.g., Take Today financing, Jewelry VIP) are available at every store location
best_for: Las Vegas residents needing immediate cash against electronics, jewelry, tools, or firearms
Bargain shoppers seeking brand-name pre-owned electronics, gaming gear, or jewelry at 25–70% below retail
Gun owners looking to use firearms as short-term loan collateral
Shoppers who want layaway or installment financing on a used item without a credit check
diagnosis: EZPAWN Las Vegas is best suited for unbanked or credit-constrained consumers who need fast liquidity against a physical asset, or budget shoppers hunting discounted used merchandise. The main caveat is that pawn loan costs are opaque online and typically carry high effective APRs—this should be a last resort for cash needs, not a primary borrowing strategy.
services: Pawn loans (collateral-based, any item in working condition)
Gold and diamond jewelry buying with on-site metal testing
Firearms loans and outright purchases (rifles, shotguns, handguns)
Auto loans (special category at this location)
Pre-owned brand-name retail merchandise at 25–70% off retail
Online shop with daily new arrivals
Instant Quote tool for electronics valuation
EZ+ Rewards Program (points on pawn, redeem, buy, sell transactions)
Take Today third-party financing (up to 12 months)
Product Protection Plan for electronics and audio/video equipment
Jewelry VIP Program (guaranteed loan amounts, free cleaning, stone replacement)
